title: Front Office Manager - ISS Facility Services India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - ISS Facility Services India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
ISS Facility Services India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ISS Facility Services India:
ISS Facility Services India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISS Facility Services India!
